subject: Overlap depth signal selection
fact: In HelkinSwarm, raw Durable getStatusAll() Running/Pending overseer counts are not a reliable proxy for real in-flight overlap pressure because overseer.ts intentionally holds instances Running for 60 seconds during dedup hold. For live queue/depth decisions, use orchestratorStageHealth active-turn tracking instead of Durable runner count.
reason: This is a subtle runtime behavior that caused a false-positive live queue regression when using getStatusAll() to infer interruption depth. Recording it should prevent future orchestrator/guard fixes from repeating the same mistake.
